title: A to Z 30072 Poppy The Pony Playset
features: Groom and saddle up Poppy the Pony
Accessories Include Comb, Saddle, Shovel, Bucket And More
Suitable for age 3 years and upwards
description: Product Description Have fun grooming and saddling up your very own Poppy the pony. Poppy measures approx. 16cm high. The set includes lots of accessories including comb, saddle, shovel and bucket. This playset conforms to EN71 and the toy safety Directive. PLEASE remove all packaging before giving it to your child. This toy is suitable for age 3 years and upwards. Safety Warning not suitable for children under 36 months. Choking hazard - small parts Box Contains 1 x Poppy Pony Playset See more
